name: Sunflower Rye Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In the bread machine pan, place all ingredients in the order suggested by the manufacturer.
2. Select the wheat bread setting. If your bread machine has options for crust color and loaf size, choose them as desired.
3. Bake according to the bread machine's directions. Check the dough after 5 minutes of mixing; add 1 to 2 tablespoons of water or flour if needed.
4. Yield: 1 loaf (2 pounds)
